content.en:
"The Endless Origin Ancestor actually entered the ninth place on the Ten Thousand Xuan List!"

Feng Ming's original ancestor was surprised.

She also participated once, and at that time, she was also in the half-step fivefold ancestral realm, and she luckily came out alive.

At that time, she also encountered dangerous situations many times, and almost died of willpower.

She knew very well how terrifying those powerful and high-level primordial ancestors were in the primordial golden domain, and those in the Upper Spirit Primordial Domain who had comprehended one hundred and eight extreme extremes and solidified more than two kinds of natal primordial control techniques, and if they were not careful, they might not necessarily save their lives.

Besides, even if you have a strong life-saving ability and don't die, it is impossible to enter the ninth place on the Wanxuan List!

"The Endless Origin Ancestor is only the peak of the Quadruple Origin Ancestor, how many extreme pole paths has he comprehended, and how many hole cards does he have?"

Feng Ming's original ancestor was curious.

And the Ice Feather Holy Son, these Quadruple Primordial Ancestors, were stunned when they learned that Ye Tian had entered the ninth place on the Ten Thousand Xuan List and had crushed a large number of half-step Fivefold Primordial Ancestors in the entire Primeval Domain Boundary.

You must know that the primeval primordial domain realm has ninety-three high-level primordial domains, and the upper spirit primordial domain is ranked in the middle, even if it is the first and fourth primordial ancestors of the upper-spirit primordial domain, it may not be ranked in the top three in some high-level primordial domains.

Even if the Upper Spirit Origin Domain could have a half-step fivefold ancestor who entered the top 100, it would be all against the sky!

And not long after Ye Tiancai broke through to the peak of the Fourfold Primordial Ancestor, it was impossible for him to become a half-step Fivefold Primordial Ancestor after entering the Primordial Golden Domain, so Ye Tian was still at a disadvantage in terms of cultivation.

As a result, Ye Tian entered the ninth place on the Wanxuan List!

What a wickedness!

And soon after, the entire upper echelons of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain heard about Ye Tian's existence.

Nine Lights Holy Gate.

"The Endless Ancestor is so demonic, it's a bit of trouble to kill him!"

Dawn Holy Ancestor frowned.

Even if he broke through to the half-step sixfold ancestor realm, the Void Fang Holy Ancestor of the Void Fang Holy Gate would definitely not allow him to kill the Endless Ancestor, and the Void Fang Saint Ancestor was an old half-step sixfold ancestor, and no one knew how far he was from the sixfold ancestor.

Moreover, once a demon like Ye Tian was really made to become a Fivefold Ancestor, he would not even want to kill him.

"When I become a half-step six-fold ancestor, I still look for an opportunity, but I must be foolproof before I can make a move!"

Dawn Saint Ancestor thought to himself.

After all, he didn't want to fail, otherwise he would be in trouble in the future if he offended such a demonic ancestor!

......

"This half-step fivefold primordial ancestor is not weak, he still has such a primordial holy soldier, blocking my endless golden light, and it took more than ten moves to kill it!"

Ye Tian held a bead and muttered.

Primordial Divine Soldier, Primordial Saint Soldier, Primordial Treasure.

This is the grade of the Primordial Ancestor level weapons on the side of the High Origin Domain, among which the Primordial Saint Soldiers are very different from each other, and this mirror is definitely the top Primordial Saint Soldier.

In addition, this guy's strength is also very strong, he has comprehended about one hundred and fifty extreme extreme paths, and has also created a consummation-level natal primordial control technique containing more than one hundred and fifty kinds.

Coupled with this Primordial Saint Soldier defensive weapon, the strength of the body is indeed very strong.

It's a pity that he met him, and he pierced the body of the original ancestor with endless golden light, annihilating and killing him.

"Hey, this guy also got more than 10,000 primordial gold beads, that's great!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

The boundary of the Archean Plains, the True River Plains.

Tianlin Origin Ancestor was extremely angry: "Damn, I was actually killed by a guy at the peak of the Quadruple Origin Ancestor!! my more than 10,000 Primordial Gold Beads, my Black Cloud Beads, all gone!!"

After another period of time, a group of five-fold ancestors and half-step six-fold ancestors outside the Origin Golden Domain found that the name of the fifty-third Tianlin Origin Ancestor on the Ten Thousand Xuan List had disappeared.

"What's going on with this Tianlin Primordial Ancestor, the name suddenly disappeared!" a half-step Sixfold Primordial Ancestor said curiously.

At this time.

A half-step six-fold Origin Ancestor of the True River Origin Domain said coldly: "The will clone of the Tianlin Origin Ancestor has been killed, so his name will disappear!"

"What, the fifty-third place in the Wanxuan List was killed? This can enter the top 100, the difference in strength between each other should not be big, even if he can't fight, he can escape, unless he meets the top few of the Wanxuan List, he will be killed, right?"

"Who killed it?"

"Don't stimulate the True River Domain, there are only two original ancestors in the True River Origin Domain who have entered the top 100 of the Ten Thousand Xuan List, but one has fallen, and the loss is not small!"

"I'm afraid that those fivefold primordial ancestors of the True River Origin Domain are going to be gone this time, hahaha, most of them bet on more than two, and only one is left!"

The half-step Sixfold Ancestor of the True River Plains didn't continue to speak, let alone reveal who killed him, and in fact he didn't know who it was.

He only knew that it was a fourfold peak ancestor, and although it was a little hard to believe, it was a fact.

If he said that it was a Quadruple Peak Origin Ancestor who killed the Tianlin Ancestor, the other half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestors of the High Origin Domain would not be able to mock them desperately!

So, he just shut up.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's ranking on the Wanxuan list slowly rose from ninth to eighth, seventh, sixth, and fifth......

At this rate, Ye Tian even has the hope of rising to the first place on the Wanxuan List!

Of course.

Ye Tian didn't have the idea of competing for this list, he didn't know how many names he was in, he just wanted to kill more half-step fivefold ancestors to get more resources and primordial gold beads.

"More than 80,000 primordial gold beads!"

Ye Tian was extremely satisfied with his harvest.

However, the number of Primordial Ancestors who still existed in the Primordial Golden Domain was very small, and many Primordial Ancestors left directly.

Almost all of the original ancestors who stayed here now were half-step fivefold ancestors, and they were all very powerful half-step fivefold ancestors, otherwise they wouldn't have the courage to stay here.

this day.

Ye Tian met a half-step fivefold ancestor again, the Nine Swords Ancestor!

If Ye Tian inquired about the Void Tooth Holy Gate, he would know that the Nine Swords Origin Ancestor was ranked tenth on the Ten Thousand Xuan List, and he definitely belonged to one of the most demonic Origin Ancestors in the entire Ancient Origin Realm.

"Hey, at this time period, there is also a Quadruple Peak Ancestor, this guy is really bold!"

The Nine Swords Ancestor said curiously.

He didn't think too much about it, and slashed it directly with a sword.

In his opinion, one sword was enough to kill a fourfold peak ancestor, and if it couldn't be solved, then two swords.

Swish!

Ye Tian used his endless speed, dodged this sword, and then killed the Nine Swords Ancestor.

Seeing this, the Nine Swords Ancestor was dignified.

He knew that Ye Tian was not simple, so he immediately exerted all his strength.

Rumble!!!

The Thousand Tribulation Sword Body is urging, this is the top Primordial Body.

And three hundred and sixty-five layers of the Will Pagoda appeared on his body to protect his whole body, but only two hundred and eighty-eight layers of the Will Pagoda were engraved with the Extreme Extreme Dao.

As a result, he had only comprehended two hundred and eighty-eight extreme paths.

But for ordinary ancestors, this is also very terrifying!

"Domain Slashing Sword!"

The terrifying perfection-level natal primordial control technique burst out, turning into a terrifying sword light and slashing towards Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian protected his whole body with an endless light shield, and then used endless golden light to attack the Nine Swords Ancestor.

Not only that, Ye Tian also cast the Endless Black Domain, enveloping this area, and he didn't want the Nine Swords Ancestor to escape.

Before, he hadn't cast the Endless Black Domain, because there was no need, and the other Primordial Ancestors couldn't escape.

But judging from the Nine Swords Ancestor's full attack, this is a formidable enemy, and he must make sure that he can keep him.
